name: apple-m3-max
notes: Apple M3 Max (Metal), Qwen2.5-Coder-7B, per-quant tok/s (45s cooldown, each quant downloaded/benched/deleted iteratively due to disk; Q4_K_M re-benched in all 5 runs as a stability check, spread only 52.6-54.3). Metal tps: Q2_K 49.9, Q3_K_M 43.5, Q4_K_M 53.5, Q5_K_M 39.8, Q6_K 42.2, Q8_0 33.8. SURPRISE: Q4_K_M is the FASTEST quant on Metal, beating the smaller Q2_K/Q3_K_M — its dequant kernels are the most optimized. Q8_0 slowest. Smaller != faster on Apple Silicon. Quality (drift/pass-rate) is hardware-independent and matches the 5060 Ti quality cliff; only speed is platform-specific. Q4_K_M is both the quality AND speed sweet spot here.

meta.note: Metal tps per quant (M3 Max). Quality (drift/pass-rate) is hardware-independent; see the primary RTX 5060 Ti results for quality. Q4_K_M tps averaged over 5 repeat runs (52.6-54.3, ~3% spread).
